en: I needed to go to school.

ab: Maapac kako i dafak tayra i picodadan.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: Yo tayra kako i picodadan, matawal ako ko kafang.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: Awa ko nihawikidan ako a maamaan.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: Micodad sato, i kapot sato kako minengneng to codad.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: pisekingan sato, pacaliw saan ko cafay to inpic ato sapisisit. i takowanan.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: pasowal sa ko singsi i takowanan: “aka to paliyaw maapac, karatar molowad to dafak!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「不要再遲到了，下次早點起床!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
